function.name: lcm
function.description: Calculate the Least Common Multiple of two numbers.
function.long_description: Computes the least common multiple (LCM) of two integers, the smallest number divisible by both.
example_user_queries: Calculate the least common multiple of 21 and 6.
What is the LCM for a = 14 and b = 35?
Give me the least common multiple of 9 and 15.
Find the least common multiple between 11 and 13.
Calculate lcm using a 45 and b 30.
What is the lcm result for 7 and 5?
Work out the LCM of 27 and 36.
